data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures all sensitive data in transit is encrypted using TLS 1.2 or higher.
data.technical_spec: TLS across all data exchange, AES-256 for stored data.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Provides an optional 2FA mechanism to enhance user account security.
data.technical_spec: Supports authentication apps like Google Authenticator for time-based codes.

data.title: Rate Limiting
data.description: Implements rate limiting to prevent DDoS attacks and API abuse.
data.technical_spec: Configurable limits using API gateways and middleware.

data.title: Vulnerability Scanning
data.description: Conducts regular vulnerability scans and penetration testing on infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Tools like Qualys and internal penetration testing teams.

data.title: User Privacy Controls
data.description: Offers users comprehensive privacy settings to manage data visibility.
data.technical_spec: Custom privacy settings, GDPR compliance tools.
